title: Ennai Thottu Allikonda Lyrics Unna Nenachen Pattu Padichen
stanzas: <div>Ennai Thottu Allikonda Lyrics Unna Nenachen Pattu Padichen

Ennai thottu allikonda
mannam perum ennadi
enakku solladi
vishayam ennadi.

nenjai thottu pinnikonda
kannan oorum ennadi
enakku solladi
vishayam ennadi.

anbe oaadi vaa
anbaal koodavaa
oh.. payinglili..

nithamum
Ennai thottu allikonda
mannam perum ennadi
enakku solladi
vishayam ennadi.

sondham bandham unnai
thaalaattum tharum
sorgam sorgam
ennai seeraatta varanum.

ponni ponni nadhi
neeraada varanum
ennai ennai nithamum
nee aala varanum.

penmanasu kaanaatha
indhira jaalathai
allithara thaanaaga
vandhuvidu

ennuyirai theeyaakkum
manmadha baanathai
kandu konjam kaapaathi
thandhu vidu.

anbe oadi vaa
anbala koodavaa(2)
oh .. payingili.

nithamum
Ennai thottu
nenjai thottu

Ennai thottu allikonda
mangai perum ennadi
enakku solladi
vishayam ennadi.

nenjai thottu pinnikonda
nangai oorum ennadi
enakku solladi
vishayam ennadi.

manjal manjal konjum
ponnaana malare
oonjal oonjal thannil
thaanaadum nilave.

minnal minnal kodi
polaadum azhage.
kannan kannan mozhi
nee paadu kuyile

kattukulla nikkaadhu
thirindha kaalaiyai
kattivittu kan sirikkum
sudhariye.

akkaraiyum ikkaraiyum
kadantha vellaththai
katti anaikatti vaitha
payingiliye.

ennil neeyadi..
unni naanadi..(2)
oh... payingili

nithamum
Ennai thottu allikonda
mangai perum ennadi
enakku solladi
vishayam ennadi.

nenjai thottu pinnikonda
nangai oorum ennadi
enakku solladi
vishayam ennadi.

anbe oaadi vaa
anbaal koodavaa
oh.. payinglili..

nithamum
Ennai thottu allikonda
mangai perum ennadi
enakku solladi
vishayam ennadi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the feelings of the characters in the movie.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in Unna Nenachen Pattu Padichen, highlighting the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the iconic voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and Swarnalatha.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this beautiful duet was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on April 12, 1992.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ennai Thottu Allikonda from Unna Nenachen Pattu Padichen is a heartfelt expression of love and yearning. It beautifully captures the emotions of the characters as they navigate their feelings for each other. The soothing melody, combined with the powerful vocals of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and Swarnalatha, evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. This timeless classic resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys and sorrows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennai Thottu Allikonda is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and Swarnalatha, this song evokes a deep sense of nostalgia. The magic of Unna Nenachen Pattu Padichen is further enhanced by the legendary music of Ilaiyaraaja, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Ennai Thottu Allikonda Lyrics Unna Nenachen Pattu Padichen
Tell me what my great pride is, that has touched me.
Tell me what my heart has grasped, Kannan, what is my matter?
Oh beloved, come here, oh.. like a bird..
Always my great pride has touched me, tell me what my matter is.
The bond and relationship will lead you to heaven, heaven must come to me.
The golden river must flow, you must always come to me.
The mind that cannot see the feminine web must come here.
Protect me from the arrow of love that can take my life.
Oh beloved, come here, oh.. like a bird..
Always my heart has touched me.
Tell me what my great pride is, that has touched me.
Tell me what my heart has grasped, what is my matter?
The yellow flower that is a little golden swings in the moonlight.
Like lightning, beautiful as a flag. Kannan, you sing like a cuckoo.
Do not stand still, let the morning smile and shine.
Oh bird that has crossed the river, you have tied everything together.
You are in me.. I am in you.. oh... like a bird.
Always my great pride has touched me, tell me what my matter is.
Tell me what my heart has grasped, what is my matter?
Oh beloved, come here, oh.. like a bird..
Always my great pride has touched me, tell me what my matter is.
